message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 161 progress comment

RusticMaple: runtime_compat::JoinSet::join_next_with_cx. Per-poll
cx.checkpoint inside poll_fn (not just pre-flight) — cancellation
surfaces same-tick rather than waiting for next task completion.
Test uses never-completing std::future::pending to prove contract:
if checkpoint were moved after handle scan, test would hang.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
